traditionalLabelsRelyOnNonBiod: Traditional labels rely on non-biodegradable plastics (PP/PET) and synthetic adhesives that break down into persistent microplastics, remaining in our ecosystem for centuries.
unlikeTraditionalPlasticPpPetL: Unlike traditional plastic (PP/PET) labels that break down into persistent microplastics, our PLA compostable labels completely degrade under standard composting conditions. Over 180 days, microorganisms break down the face stock, bio-adhesive, and plant-based printing ink into clean biomass, water, and CO2, fully blending back into the natural eco-system.
